Who I Am

Building the Web,
One Project at a Time.

I'm Gbadebo Samuel, a professional WordPress developer and frontend designer based in Nigeria. With 3+ years of hands-on experience, I build fast, visually compelling, and high-performing websites for businesses across diverse industries.

Beyond code, I write authoritative technical articles on Spinah and UPay, and have published peer-reviewed research in machine learning sentiment analysis. I also bring Excel-based data analytics skills to every engagement.
